{{Infobox concept
| name = White Light
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[White Light]] represents selflessness and pure devotion to the service of another at one's own expense.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Rhalia]] mentions [[Alin]] is not complete without the [[White Light]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[White Light]] can only be used on another's behalf.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] has [[White Light]] leaking out of him.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
